name: Check that books from search result contain one or more entered latin letters or numeric in Palace
fullName: Search libraries and books: Check that books from search result contain one or more entered latin letters or numeric in Palace

steps.name: Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "Palace Bookshelf" on Add library screen
And  Enter word a and save as 'info' on catalog books screen
Then  Books contain word 'info' on catalog books screen
